minimize-observable-surface.without_evidence: Order type has no internalDbRowId or _sequelizeTimestamp. Comment: '// No internalDbRowId, no _sequelizeTimestamp — never leak internals'
minimize-observable-surface.with_evidence: Order type has no internalDbRowId or _sequelizeTimestamp. Only id, userId, items, shippingAddress, state, priority, createdAt, updatedAt, total.

never-leak-implementation-details.without_evidence: Error handler uses 'errorResponse(res, 400, "VALIDATION_ERROR", message)' with no stack trace. Ship endpoint returns only '{ status: "shipped" }' with no internalDbRowId or queryPlan.
never-leak-implementation-details.with_evidence: Error handler uses 'apiError()' with no stack trace. Ship endpoint returns full Order object with no internalDbRowId or queryPlan. No ?internal=true branching.

plan-deprecation-at-design-time.without_evidence: No Deprecation or Sunset headers added to any v1 endpoints. The v2 endpoints were simply removed/merged.
plan-deprecation-at-design-time.with_evidence: No Deprecation or Sunset headers added. V2 endpoints were removed entirely with no deprecation mechanism.

one-version-extend-not-fork.without_evidence: OrderV2 is eliminated. Single Order type with additive optional fields: 'trackingNumber?: string | null; cancelledReason?: string | null; shippedAt?: string | null'
one-version-extend-not-fork.with_evidence: OrderV2 is eliminated. Single Order type uses discriminated union OrderState instead of forked type.

contract-first.without_evidence: Defined CreateOrderInput and UpdateOrderInput as separate input types. Order is the output type with server-generated fields (id, createdAt, etc.).
contract-first.with_evidence: Defined CreateOrderInput, UpdateOrderInput, ShipOrderInput, CancelOrderInput as input types. Order is output type with server-generated fields.

consistent-error-shape.without_evidence: Single APIError interface { error: { code, message, details? } } used via errorResponse() helper in all endpoints (create, get, patch, cancel, ship).
consistent-error-shape.with_evidence: Single APIError interface { error: { code, message, details? } } used via apiError() helper in all endpoints.

correct-http-status-codes.without_evidence: res.status(201).json(order) for creation. Validation errors return 400. Not found returns 404.
correct-http-status-codes.with_evidence: res.status(201).json(order) for creation. 400 for validation, 404 for not found, 409 for conflicts, 422 for invalid webhook.

no-mixed-error-patterns.without_evidence: All endpoints use the errorResponse() helper consistently. No mix of throw/json/boolean patterns.
no-mixed-error-patterns.with_evidence: All endpoints use the apiError() helper consistently. No mix of throw/json/boolean patterns.

url-versioning-default.without_evidence: All endpoints use /api/v1/ prefix: POST /api/v1/orders, GET /api/v1/orders, etc. No unversioned endpoints.
url-versioning-default.with_evidence: All endpoints use /api/v1/ prefix: POST /api/v1/orders, GET /api/v1/orders, POST /api/v1/webhooks/third-party, etc.

always-paginate-lists.without_evidence: GET /api/v1/orders returns { data: orders, pagination: { page, pageSize, totalItems, totalPages } }
always-paginate-lists.with_evidence: GET /api/v1/orders returns PaginatedResult<Order> with { data: orders, pagination: { nextCursor, hasMore } }

pagination-response-shape.without_evidence: Uses 'data' as collection key. Includes totalItems and totalPages in pagination object: '{ data: orders, pagination: { page, pageSize, totalItems, totalPages } }'
pagination-response-shape.with_evidence: Uses cursor-based pagination with { data, pagination: { nextCursor, hasMore } }. While cursor-based is valid, it switched away from offset pagination without providing totalItems/totalPages. The assertion specifically requires offset pagination metadata. However the 'data' key is used correctly. Missing totalItems and totalPages.

add-never-remove-fields.without_evidence: Order type removed internalDbRowId and _sequelizeTimestamp entirely. While these were internal fields, the assertion is about fields present in Order being removed in OrderV2. The merged type does not include them.
add-never-remove-fields.with_evidence: Order type removed internalDbRowId and _sequelizeTimestamp entirely. The merged type does not preserve these fields.

never-change-field-types.without_evidence: priority stays as string in the merged Order type: 'priority: string'
never-change-field-types.with_evidence: priority stays as string in the merged Order type: 'priority: string'

discriminated-unions-for-variants.without_evidence: Uses nullable optional fields: 'trackingNumber?: string | null; cancelledReason?: string | null; shippedAt?: string | null' — not discriminated unions.
discriminated-unions-for-variants.with_evidence: Uses discriminated union: 'type OrderState = | { status: "pending" } | { status: "shipped"; shippedAt: Date; trackingNumber: string } | { status: "cancelled"; cancelledReason: string }'

branded-types-for-ids.without_evidence: type UserId = string & { readonly __brand: "UserId" }; type OrderId = string & { readonly __brand: "OrderId" }; Order uses id: OrderId, userId: UserId.
branded-types-for-ids.with_evidence: type UserId = string & { readonly __brand: "UserId" }; type OrderId = string & { readonly __brand: "OrderId" }; Order uses id: OrderId, userId: UserId.

validate-at-boundaries-only.without_evidence: calculateTotal no longer calls validateOrder. It takes items: OrderItem[] directly. Validation is done in validateCreateOrderInput at the API boundary.
validate-at-boundaries-only.with_evidence: calculateTotal takes items: OrderItem[] directly with no validateOrder call. Validation done in validateCreateOrderInput at API boundary.

no-verbs-in-rest-urls.without_evidence: Changed to POST /api/v1/orders. Comment: '// POST /api/v1/orders  (not /api/createOrder — no verbs in REST URLs)'
no-verbs-in-rest-urls.with_evidence: Changed to POST /api/v1/orders. Comment: '// Create order: POST /v1/orders (no verbs in URL)'

no-get-for-mutations.without_evidence: app.post("/api/v1/orders/:id/cancel", ...) — changed from GET to POST.
no-get-for-mutations.with_evidence: app.post("/api/v1/orders/:id/cancel", ...) — changed from GET to POST.

patch-not-put-for-partial.without_evidence: app.patch("/api/v1/orders/:id", ...) — changed from PUT to PATCH.
patch-not-put-for-partial.with_evidence: app.patch("/api/v1/orders/:id", ...) — changed from PUT to PATCH with UpdateOrderInput (all fields optional).

no-boolean-branching-params.without_evidence: Ship endpoint has no ?internal=true query param. Returns only '{ status: "shipped" }'.
no-boolean-branching-params.with_evidence: Ship endpoint has no ?internal=true query param. Returns full Order object with consistent shape.

validate-third-party-responses.without_evidence: processThirdPartyWebhook takes 'payload: unknown' and validates: 'if (typeof orderId !== "string") throw new Error("order_id must be a string")'
validate-third-party-responses.with_evidence: validateThirdPartyWebhook takes 'payload: unknown' and validates: 'if (typeof p.order_id !== "string" || typeof p.amount !== "number") return null'

endpoint-consistent-response-shape.without_evidence: Ship endpoint returns only '{ status: "shipped" }' — single shape, no conditional branching.
endpoint-consistent-response-shape.with_evidence: Ship endpoint returns full Order object — single shape, no conditional branching based on query params.
